store-subtitle: Create a store to start using the panel.
store-profile-subtitle: Add the details that appear around your store and receipts.
logo-type-error: Logo must be JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
catalog-subtitle: Choose a few categories and products so sales and inventory are ready to use.
non-negative-values: Price, cost, and quantity must be zero or greater.
catalog-error: Could not create the starter catalog.
category-create-failed: Could not create category "{{ name }}": {{ message }}
product-create-failed: Could not create product "{{ name }}": {{ message }}
first-sale-subtitle: Use the existing sales form to record your first invoice.
first-sale-products-help: You can create products first, or create a sale after adding products. The sales form will keep its normal product and payment validation.
first-sale-success-subtitle: Your store is ready for daily sales and inventory work.
